Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Defendants, Rudolph G. Koppl. Annette Pucci-Koppl, the Rudolph G. Koppl Trust, individually and sued erroneously as Marina Green Properties, Inc.'s Motion seeking clarification of court order re: motion for Good Faith Settlement and Sealing of Court Records.
Appearances: Gregory M. Gentile, Esq.(408)918-4554 for defendants and moving party
Robert E. Lazo, Esq.(415)296-8510 for plaintiff, Sharon Smith
Helen V. Wenzel. Eqs.(415)296 8510 for plaintiff Sharon Smith, administrator to
the estate of Dianne Whipple.
* The Court held an in-camera hearing. After hearing oral arguements, the Court ruled that the motion for good faith settlement and order dated December 20, 2002 are confirmed. Order signed in open court. The transcript of this proceeding is under seal and not to be reproduced without court order. The sealing of the court records pursuant to the order of Dec. 18, 2002 remains in effect. Judge: A.J. Robertson,II; Clerk: R. Goulding; Reporter: K. Farnsworth CSR # 5162. (PB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination
Off Calendar Dec-20-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS RUDOLPH G. KOPPL, ANNETTE PUCCI-KOPPL, THE RUDOLPH G. KOPPL TRUST, individually and sued erroneously as MARINA GREEN PROPERTIES, INC. Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement:
APPEAR: Gregory M. Gentile, Esq. 408/918-4554 for defts & moving parties; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court held an in-camera hearing. The Court adopted its tentative ruling (GRANTED). Order signed in open court. Transcript under seal, may not be revealed without court order & Mr. Koppl to be notified if any requests for transcript. (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Patrick Heard, CSR #11055
